title: Increasedvolumeofnewmobileappreleasesontheappleappstoresignalsrisingdemandfortechnologyinnovation
thesis: A surge in newly published mobile apps indicates higher developer activity and consumer engagement, suggesting a bullish outlook for tech innovation. The technology sector benefits directly from increased software development and app adoption trends.
data_sources: Apple App Store New Releases API
signal_logic: If daily new app releases increase by more than 15% compared to the 30-day average
entry_exit: Entry: If daily new app releases increase by more than 15% compared to the 30-day average Exit: After 7 trading days or if new app releases decline below the 30-day average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Apple App Store New Releases API via api (daily).

schema.idea: Increased volume of new mobile app releases on the Apple App Store signals rising demand for technology innovation.

data.source: Apple App Store New Releases API

schema.behavior: A surge in newly published mobile apps indicates higher developer activity and consumer engagement, suggesting a bullish outlook for tech innovation.

market_impact.rationale: The technology sector benefits directly from increased software development and app adoption trends.

trade_logic.entry: If daily new app releases increase by more than 15% compared to the 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or if new app releases decline below the 30-day average
